step1Desc.message: Capture a screenshot or describe the harmful AI content.

step2Title.message: What kind of harm is this?

step3Desc.message: Your report is encrypted on your device. You choose what happens next.

orLabel.message: or describe in your own words

discPrivateDesc.message: Stays on your device only. Never sent anywhere.

discAnonDesc.message: Sent without any personal identifiers. Helps researchers detect patterns.

discPartnerDesc.message: Shared with a vetted civil society organisation who may follow up.

confirmDesc.message: Thank you. Your report has been securely received. Your identity remains private.

privacyNotice.message: 🔒 No account required. No personal data stored.
